case_title: NETFORTRIS ACQUISTION CORP. INC. ET AL VS. ELEVATE INVESTMENT GROUP, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-28-2016 CONTINUED TO APR-26-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DECLARATION ISO CLERKS JUDGMENT AND CONFIRMING UNAVAILABILITY OF ORIGINAL DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 17058065) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NETFORTRIS ACQUISTION CORP. INC. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TELEKENEX IXC HOLDINGS, INC.

DECLARATION OF DUYEN NGUYEN ISO CLERKS DEFAULT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 17058065) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NETFORTRIS ACQUISTION CORP. INC. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TELEKENEX IXC HOLDINGS, INC.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 17059024) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

AS TO DEFENDANT ELEVATE INVESTMENT GROUP, LLC DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-28-2016 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-23-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-05-2016

REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $649.92 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 17058065) AS TO DEFENDANT ELEVATE INVESTMENT GROUP, LLC
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-26-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 16341004), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF NETFORTRIS ACQUISTION CORP. INC. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TELEKENEX IXC HOLDINGS, INC. SERVED JUL-27-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ELEVATE INVESTMENT GROUP, LLC

DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF NETFORTRIS ACQUISTION CORP. INC. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TELEKENEX IXC HOLDINGS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ELEVATE INVESTMENT GROUP, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NETFORTRIS ACQUISTION CORP. INC. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TELEKENEX IXC HOLDINGS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ELEVATE INVESTMENT GROUP, LLC $75,306.80 PRINCIPAL, $5,652.62 INTEREST, $649.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $81,609.37, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 17059024)
